data.body: CI ALERT: 264f change 576 Verified-1 FAILURE. Root cause: 'Docs-index completeness gate' -> scripts/check_docs_index.py NOT FOUND in my tree. My stack is based on STALE origin/main (c8aa1ecdd from hours ago); main added that script+workflow-step since. GHA runs main's workflow against my old tree -> file missing. FIX: rebase whole stack onto current origin/main (brings in new scripts), re-push, re-CI ALL changes. Deferred until 2f13 implementer finishes + commits (can't rebase w/ uncommitted work). This also means my local make-test pre-flights were vs stale base; must re-verify vs current main after rebase (+run check_docs_index.py locally).
